title: Fire Evacuation Protocol
content: In case of fire, evacuate immediately via designated exit routes. Do not use lifts. Gather at the nearest assembly point and notify Fire Control Room (101).

title: Gas Leakage / CO Hazard Safety
content: If carbon monoxide (CO) or gas alarms trigger, don your personal gas detector and evacuation escape mask immediately. Evacuate crosswind/upwind.

title: Electrical Shock & LOTO
content: Apply Lock-Out Tag-Out (LOTO) procedures before commencing any machine maintenance. Use insulated tools and non-conductive safety gloves.

title: Mandatory PPE Protocol
content: Workers must wear industrial safety helmets, steel-toed safety shoes, high-visibility reflective vests, and safety goggles inside active plant zones.

title: First Aid for Thermal Burns
content: For industrial heat/steam burns, immediately flush the area with clean, cold running water for 15-20 minutes. Cover loosely with sterile dressing. Call Plant Ambulance (102).
